creator: colin-ports@heliocat.net
text:
Created attachment 159954
Update port to new version

Update skalibs version.

Diff contains the following changes:
Makefile: Version bump
Makefile: Change OPTIONS_DEFINE= DOC whitespace to tab (portlint was complaining).
distinfo: contents update
pkg-plist: shared library name change

Notable changes between 2.3.6.0 and 2.3.6.1:
Makefile changes to support clean in-place rebuilds. This wasn't an issue with FreeBSD ports but it uncovered some makefile issues in the dependent ports.
